semantic.role: Define and enforce naming convention rules for the codebase to maintain consistency and readability.
responsibilities: Interface naming conventions (I prefix) for files under src/types/**/*.ts
Test file naming conventions (.test.ts or .spec.ts) for files under tests/**
Maintenance scope: rules are scoped to specific directories and serve as a reference for code review and automated checks
outOfScope: Naming conventions for other file types or code elements (classes, functions, variables, etc.)
Code formatting rules beyond naming (e.g., indentation, spacing)
Detailed linting tool configuration or severity override justifications

English.purpose: To document the naming rules that must be followed across the ArchSpine monorepo, ensuring a consistent and predictable codebase style.
English.context_and_audience: This rule list is intended for all developers contributing to the ArchSpine project, especially those creating or modifying TypeScript interfaces in src/types or adding test files under tests/. It serves as a quick reference to avoid style disputes and to align with automated linting expectations.
key_takeaways: All internal interfaces in src/types must be prefixed with 'I' (e.g., IUserRepository).
Test files must end with either .test.ts or .spec.ts to match test runner conventions.
Violations are treated as Warnings for interface naming and Errors for test file naming, reflecting their relative importance.
